agent_notes: Baseline run established a floor. All 5 initial strategies failed to hit any prizes in either val or test. The key surprise was entropy_low (entropy=0.01) in trial 5 - it achieved 6% val hit rate vs 0% for all others. This suggests the reward signal is dominated by committing to specific outcomes rather than hedging; with 8 matches needing all-correct, a focused policy is essential.
Higher LR (0.02) marginally improved over baseline but still 0% hit rate. The LR sweeps show diminishing returns in the no-hit regime - the policy is not learning to pick winners.
Very high LR (0.05) improved test slightly (-17.29 vs -18.00) but val was still -18.00. Likely overfitting to training noise. Still 0% hit rate.

entropy_low (entropy=0.01) is the real breakthrough: val_hit=6% means 1/17 val rounds had a winning combo. The lower entropy forces the policy to commit to its best guess per match rather than spreading bets. Next priority: combine low entropy with larger k (32-50) to get more coverage while maintaining focused per-match picks, and try multi-seed to reduce variance. Also try entropy=0 and longer training.

mlp_32 (h=32) with default settings (k=20, lr=0.005, entropy=0.05) achieved val_net=+25.79/round - genuinely profitable on val! test_net=-16.00 is still negative though, showing high variance with 17 rounds. Score=+6.36 is by far the best so far. The nonlinear MLP is capturing something a linear policy cannot. Separately, k32 (linear, k=32) got +3.90 with test_net=-1.00 almost break-even - more combos gives more chances to catch the rare winning round. Next: combine mlp_32 with k=32, multi-seed, and lower entropy to try to improve test performance. Also: mlp_32 + k32 + entropy_low is the natural combination to try.
mlp_128_k50 got val_net=+93.98 but test_net=-27.00. Very high variance - the k=50 extra combos make losses steeper when no prize. This is likely a lucky val hit.

mlp_32_s5 is the breakthrough: 5 random seeds + h=32 MLP achieves val_net=+180.55/round, val_hit=12% (2/17 rounds with prizes). score=+84.21 is massive. The multi-seed approach is crucial: by trying 5 random init seeds and keeping the best val performer, we find policies that happen to correctly predict the rare winning outcomes. test_net=-18.00 still 0 hits though - the high val score is from lucky val prize hits. Next: combine mlp_32_s5 with k=32 (more combos = more chances), lower entropy, and longer training to try to generalize to test.
